title: [CI:DOCS] Set all swagger operation id's to be compatible
body:
* Libpod operation id's changed to better match compatible id

Supersedes #9123 by included all commits. 

Additionally, corrects a duplicated ID that prevented that PR#9123 from merging, and rebased to current master.

Signed-off-by: Tom Deseyn <tom.deseyn@gmail.com>
Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@tmds I pulled your commits from https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/9123 so I could build on them and fix some issues.

Please review this PR and thanks for all your help!
